default.description: Default capability set for the automation kernel. Phase 3e pass 5: TS interpretation plane built at src/lib/bridge/ipc.ts (21 typed wrappers), but custom permission files for each Rust command are NOT yet generated. The TS plane exists as future-proofing; no React consumers call into it yet. To actually enable IPC for any Rust command, a follow-up pass needs to generate Tauri 2.x ACL manifest + permission.json files per the Tauri 2.x custom-command pattern.
